name: Teletrac Navman Fleet Telematics API
what_it_does: Teletrac Navman REST API for fleet telematics, GPS tracking, and transportation compliance management. Enables AI agents to manage real-time vehicle location and fleet tracking for transportation operations, handle ELD (Electronic Logging Device) and hours of service (HOS) compliance for DOT regulatory compliance, access driver performance scoring and safety analytics for fleet safety management, retrieve fuel consumption and efficiency analytics for fleet cost management, manage fleet maintenance alerts and vehicle health data for preventive maintenance, handle DVIRs (Driver Vehicle Inspection Reports) for vehicle safety compliance, access video telematics and dashcam event data for fleet safety, retrieve route optimization and dispatch workflow data for logistics management, manage IFTA (International Fuel Tax Agreement) reporting for motor carrier compliance, and integrate Teletrac Navman data with dispatch, ERP, and fleet management platforms.
use_cases: Tracking vehicles in real-time from fleet dispatch agents
Monitoring HOS compliance from DOT compliance agents
Analyzing driver safety from fleet safety agents
Managing maintenance from fleet operations agents
not_for: Non-commercial passenger vehicles without fleet management focus
Maritime or rail without road vehicle fleet context
Small fleets under 5 vehicles without enterprise telematics need
best_when: A trucking company, construction fleet, or commercial vehicle fleet operator using Teletrac Navman wants AI agents to automate vehicle tracking, HOS compliance, driver safety monitoring, and maintenance management.
avoid_when: DOT COMPLIANCE RISK: ELD HOS automation must be FMCSA-compliant — automated HOS logs or edits require driver confirmation per 49 CFR Part 395; automated edits without driver acknowledgment creates FMCSA violation. ELD mandates require certified ELD hardware; software-only HOS cannot replace certified ELD. Driver privacy regulations restrict automated sharing of individual driver location and behavior data.

auth.notes: Teletrac Navman uses OAuth 2.0 and API key authentication. Developer portal at developer.teletracnavman.com. Webhooks for fleet events. REST API with JSON. Irvine, California HQ. Vontier Corporation subsidiary (Vontier spun off Fortive 2020). Teletrac merged with Navman Wireless (2015). 500,000+ vehicles tracked globally. Strong in construction, government, and trucking fleets. FMCSA-registered ELD vendor. Competes with Samsara, Geotab, and Verizon Connect for commercial fleet telematics.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — per-vehicle monthly subscription
pricing.paid_tiers: Monthly per-vehicle subscription; hardware purchase or lease
pricing.notes: Irvine, California. Vontier Corporation subsidiary. Teletrac + Navman Wireless merger 2015. 500,000+ vehicles. FMCSA-registered ELD. Competes with Samsara, Geotab, and Verizon Connect for commercial fleet telematics.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth client; documented per integration

known_agent_gotchas: DOT COMPLIANCE RISK: ELD HOS log edits require driver acknowledgment per FMCSA rules; automated HOS log modification without driver confirmation creates 49 CFR Part 395 violation
ELD hardware certification — Teletrac Navman ELD must be FMCSA-registered; software API integration must not attempt to override certified ELD hardware HOS enforcement
Driver privacy — individual driver location and behavior data is PII; automated sharing of driver performance data must comply with applicable employment and privacy laws
IFTA reporting accuracy — automated IFTA jurisdiction mileage calculation must match GPS-validated routes; IFTA audit failure creates motor carrier tax liability
Geofence automation — automated geofence alerts and triggers must account for GPS accuracy variance (5-10 meter typical); tight geofences cause false positives
Video telematics data retention — dashcam video event data has storage and retention cost implications; automated video retrieval triggers must be selective to manage storage costs
agent_readiness.security_notes: Fleet telematics. SOC2, FMCSA-ELD. OAuth2/API key. US/EU/APAC. Vehicle location and driver data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Fleet telematics. SOC2. OAuth2. US/EU. Vehicle and driver data.
